tweets.fullText:
The @Rockaway_X RWA USDC Vault has surpassed $34M in deposits in ~2 months.

USDC is actively allocated across PRIME, OnRe, and Huma markets, delivering 5.61% supply APY (90D avg) and $105K in interest generated over 60 days.

Onchain capital markets continue to scale on Kamino. https://t.co/7Vh8tyx01o
tweets.aiAnalysis: The tweet underperformed due to a lack of emotional urgency or novelty—while it includes specific metrics ($34M, 5.61% APY, $105K interest), these are presented as routine product updates rather than compelling milestones or competitive advantages that would trigger shares. The narrow focus on a single vault for a niche financial product (RWA USDC allocation across obscure markets) limited broader appeal compared to protocol-level announcements or market-moving narratives.
